# Migration Pattern
<!-- Generated by Clauding Thought /init from sampling existing migrations -->

## Canonical Example

```{{language}}
{{canonical_migration}}
```

## Required Elements

- Every migration MUST have a working `down()` method
- Foreign keys: `{{fk_convention}}`
- Indexes: `{{index_convention}}`
- Tenant column: `{{tenant_column_convention}}`

## Column Modification Rules

When modifying an existing column, you MUST restate ALL existing attributes:
```{{language}}
// Wrong -- drops the default and nullable
$table->string('name')->change();

// Correct -- preserves all attributes
$table->string('name')->nullable()->default('Unknown')->change();
```

## Naming Conventions

- Table names: `{{table_naming}}`
- Column names: `{{column_naming}}`
- Pivot tables: `{{pivot_naming}}`

## Anti-Patterns

Do NOT:
{{#each migration_antipatterns}}
- {{this}}
{{/each}}
